title: Marvell Technology Stock Price and Overview
text: Marvell Technology shares climbed 8.2% to finish at $177.95 on Wednesday, marking an all-time high, then advanced another 4.2% in premarket trading Thursday to reach $185.40. The chipmaker's stock has surged more than 100% during 2026, recording its 12th all-time closing high this year. Multiple major Wall Street analysts have recently raised their price targets on MRVL. RBC Capital analyst Srini Pajjuri increased his price target to $200 from $170. B. Riley analyst Craig Ellis raised his price target to $205 from $156. Bank of America analyst Vivek Arya raised his price target to $200 from $125. Overall, Wall Street has a Strong Buy consensus rating on Marvell Technology stock based on 22 Buys and four Holds. Goldman Sachs believes Marvell will increase its 2026 and 2027 revenue growth guidance, driven by strength in AI data center sales, and raised its fiscal 2027 and 2028 revenue estimates to $11.12 billion and $15.35 billion, respectively.
